title: Treasure Map Instructions
text:
## Treasure Map Instructions

**Start:** From the {adjective} {place}, walk {number} paces toward the {color} {object}.

**Landmarks:**
- Pass the {adjective} {animal} without {verb ending in -ing}
- Cross the bridge built by {person}

**Danger:** Beware the {plural noun} guarding the {body part} cave.

**Dig here:** X marks a spot under {number} {plural noun}.

**Loot:** One {adjective} {object} and all the {food} you can {verb}.
